{{Infobox concept
| name = Empty Ghost
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

''See also: [[Empty Ghost Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty]] [[Ghost]], also referred to as the [[Hollow King]], is a dark spirit and a significant threat characterized as a hollow imitation of humanity. Recognized for his immense danger and past transgressions, he has been designated as the temporary successor to the [[Silent King]] and is classified as the fourth [[Dreadgod]]. He exists alongside other [[Dreadgods]], including the [[Wandering Titan]] and the [[Bleeding Phoenix]]. The entity is associated with a [[void]]-like nature, described as a cold, dark hole or an endless abyss. His presence is powerful enough to draw the attention of others and has even been sensed by an [[Archlady]]. He is a figure of notoriety, with his name being known in places like [[Serpent's Grave]] and linked to rumors regarding the [[Twin Star Sect]].}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Empty Ghost]] is the name given to [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] as a temporary replacement for the [[Silent King]] and the fourth [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty]] [[Ghost]] is a name [[Malice]] bestowed upon [[Lindon]], describing a presence he can manifest that resembles a [[Dreadgod]]. While the people of Serpent’s Grave have heard rumors of this entity, [[Malice]] herself feared it might pursue her through a portal. The presence is significant enough to trigger an intruder alert in [[Northstrider's oracle codex]], prompting the [[Monarch]] to intend to fight it. Because no single [[Monarch]] can face the [[Empty]] [[Ghost]] alone, it eventually went to battle, during which time the [[Silent Servants]] treated [[Lindon]] as the new [[Silent King]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] called [[Lindon]] the [[Empty Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty Ghost]] is a [[Dreadgod]]-like presence that [[Lindon]] can manifest.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The people of Serpent’s Grave have heard about the [[Empty Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Malice]] feared the [[Empty Ghost]] might follow her through the portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty Ghost]] is an entity or event that [[Northstrider]] intends to fight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty Ghost]] triggers an intruder alert in [[Northstrider's oracle codex]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|No single [[Monarch]] can take on the [[Empty Ghost]] alone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty Ghost]] is a name given to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Empty Ghost]] went to battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent Servants]] treat [[Lindon]] as the new [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The people of Serpent’s Grave have heard about the Empty Ghost,” Cassias said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
